Skip to contents
survtrans 1.1.0
  • Reference
    • The Generation of Simulated Survival Data

Survtrans

The goal of survtrans is to …

Installation

You can install the development version of survtrans from GitHub with:

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("SignorinoY/survtrans")

Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

Multi-Source Survival Analysis 

library(survtrans)
#> 载入需要的程序包：progress
#> 载入需要的程序包：survode
#> 载入需要的程序包：survival

formula <- Surv(time, status) ~ . - group - id
group <- as.factor(sim2$group)

# Target learning
fit <- ncvcox(formula, sim2[group == 10, ], lambda = 0.15, penalty = "SCAD")
fit$coefficients
#>         X1         X2         X3         X4         X5         X6         X7 
#> -0.6713154 -0.5786179  0.3197579  0.8472311  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 
#>         X8         X9        X10        X11        X12        X13        X14 
#>  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 
#>        X15        X16        X17        X18        X19        X20 
#>  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000

# Group learning
fit <- coxgrp(formula, sim2, group, lambda = 0.02, penalty = "SCAD")
fit$coefficients
#>             1          2         3          4         5          6         7
#> X1  0.5394258 -0.7628322 0.7133059 -0.5241018 0.4686284 -0.6207682 0.5623104
#> X2  0.5845159 -0.5714762 0.7693320 -0.5994700 0.4725933 -0.7439499 0.3209021
#> X3  0.4562600  0.6392264 0.8669619  0.4704888 0.5578964  0.4915979 0.7639459
#> X4  0.3481866  0.7535935 0.6419702  0.4545768 0.5752310  0.5641411 0.5731811
#> X5  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X6  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X7  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X8  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X9  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X10 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X11 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X12 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X13 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X14 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X15 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X16 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X17 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X18 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X19 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X20 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#>              8         9         10
#> X1  -0.7321618 0.5783262 -0.6895172
#> X2  -0.6494250 0.5948016 -0.6184747
#> X3   0.5293477 0.4676483  0.4903296
#> X4   0.4680858 0.3319988  0.9018439
#> X5   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X6   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X7   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X8   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X9   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X10  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X11  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X12  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X13  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X14  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X15  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X16  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X17  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X18  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X19  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X20  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000

# Sub-group learning
fit <- coxsg(
  formula, sim2, group,
  lambda1 = 0.07, lambda2 = 0.05, penalty = "SCAD"
)
fit$coefficients
#>             1          2         3          4         5          6         7
#> X1  0.5346558 -0.6600533 0.5346558 -0.6600533 0.5346558 -0.6600533 0.5346558
#> X2  0.5089769 -0.6405885 0.5089769 -0.6405885 0.5089769 -0.6405885 0.5089769
#> X3  0.5567368  0.5567368 0.5567368  0.5567368 0.5567368  0.5567368 0.5567368
#> X4  0.5539575  0.5539575 0.5539575  0.5539575 0.5539575  0.5539575 0.5539575
#> X5  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X6  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X7  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X8  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X9  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X10 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X11 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X12 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X13 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X14 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X15 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X16 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X17 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X18 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X19 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#> X20 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000
#>              8         9         10
#> X1  -0.6600533 0.5346558 -0.6600533
#> X2  -0.6405885 0.5089769 -0.6405885
#> X3   0.5567368 0.5567368  0.5567368
#> X4   0.5539575 0.5539575  0.5539575
#> X5   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X6   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X7   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X8   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X9   0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X10  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X11  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X12  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X13  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X14  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X15  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X16  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X17  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X18  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X19  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X20  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000

# Transfer learning
fit <- coxtl(
  formula, sim2, group, 10,
  lambda1 = 0.04, lambda2 = 0.11, penalty = "SCAD"
)
fit$beta
#>          X1          X2          X3          X4          X5          X6 
#> -0.67568489 -0.65782685  0.56804805  0.57814325  0.00000000  0.00000000 
#>          X7          X8          X9         X10         X11         X12 
#>  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000 
#>         X13         X14         X15         X16         X17         X18 
#>  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000 
#>         X19         X20 
#>  0.00000000 -0.03663008

# Ensemble learning
fit <- coxens(
  formula, sim2, group,
  lambda1 = 0.02, lambda2 = 0.002, lambda3 = 0.002, penalty = "SCAD"
)
fit$coefficients
#>               1           2         3           4           5           6
#> X1   0.59875975 -0.59875975 0.5987597 -0.59875975  0.59875975 -0.59875975
#> X2   0.63640667 -0.47275450 0.7152592 -0.59926360  0.49776398 -0.69176303
#> X3  -0.03921319 -0.03921319 0.2141196 -0.03921319 -0.03921319 -0.03921319
#> X4   0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X5   0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X6   0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X7   0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X8   0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X9   0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X10  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X11  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X12  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X13  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X14  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X15  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X16  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X17  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X18  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X19  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#> X20  0.00000000  0.00000000 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.00000000
#>             7           8           9         10      Center
#> X1  0.5987597 -0.59875975  0.59875975 -0.5987597 -0.04026879
#> X2  0.3590305 -0.57399371  0.63640667 -0.5070922 -0.04639117
#> X3  0.2141196 -0.03921319 -0.03921319 -0.1537469  0.54917449
#> X4  0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.55328202
#> X5  0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X6  0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X7  0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X8  0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X9  0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X10 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X11 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X12 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X13 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X14 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X15 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X16 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X17 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X18 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X19 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000
#> X20 0.0000000  0.00000000  0.00000000  0.0000000  0.00000000

# Multi-task learning
fit <- coxmtl(
  formula, sim2, group,
  lambda1 = 0.06, lambda2 = 0.06, lambda3 = 0.04, penalty = "SCAD"
)
cbind(fit$beta, fit$eta)
#>                       1          2         3          4         5          6
#> X1  0.0000000 0.5915504 -0.5915504 0.5915504 -0.5915504 0.5915504 -0.5915504
#> X2  0.0000000 0.5748578 -0.5672794 0.5748578 -0.5672794 0.5748578 -0.5672794
#> X3  0.5561607 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X4  0.5477745 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X5  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X6  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X7  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X8  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X9  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X10 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X11 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X12 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X13 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X14 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X15 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X16 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X17 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X18 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X19 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X20 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#>             7          8         9         10
#> X1  0.5915504 -0.5915504 0.5915504 -0.5915504
#> X2  0.5369661 -0.5672794 0.5748578 -0.5672794
#> X3  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X4  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X5  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X6  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000
#> X7  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000

#> X9  0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000

#> X11 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000

#> X14 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.0000000  0.0000000

Code of Conduct

Please note that the survtrans project is released with a Contributor Code of Conduct. By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.
